/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -mavx512f -mavx512dq -mavx512bw -mavx512vl -mavx512vpopcntdq -mavx2 -mfma -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/bench_ivf_quality.dir/bench_ivf_quality.cpp.o -o bench_ivf_quality  ../libvdb_index.a ../libvdb_storage.a ../libvdb_columns.a ../libvdb_codec.a ../_deps/flatbuffers-build/libflatbuffers.a ../libvdb_io.a /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmkl_intel_lp64.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmkl_intel_thread.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmkl_core.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libiomp5.so -lm -ldl ../libvdb_crc.a ../libvdb_rabitq.a ../libvdb_simd.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgsl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgslcblas.so
